title: Unsupported: ## () cycle delay range expression
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

What would you like added/supported?

https://github.com/pulp-platform/common_cells/blob/master/test/fifo_tb.sv

```
        assert property (@(posedge clk_i) ((empty & ~push) ##1 push) |-> rdata == wdata)
            else $error("Input did not fall through");
```

```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: FlooNoC/.bender/git/checkouts/common_cells-ef73fb619e9c374f/test/fifo_tb.sv:153:60: Unsupported: ## () cycle delay range expression
  153 |         assert property (@(posedge clk_i) ((empty & ~push) ##1 push) |-> rdata == wdata)
      |                                                            ^~
                    ... For error description see https://verilator.org/warn/UNSUPPORTED?v=5.037
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
Verilator 5.037 devel rev v5.036-30-g11cfa61f8
```

Can you attach an example that runs on other simulators?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
code_blocks:
assert property (@(posedge clk_i) ((empty & ~push) ##1 push) |-> rdata == wdata)
            else $error("Input did not fall through");

      |                                                            ^~
